name: (School Days) Norfwess Academy
description:
Original creator: Dreyeko22

8+ Intros

Thank you all for the support and criticisms. I'm happy to make a bot that you all like so much , never expected it, but I'm glad it came. Thanks for all the support and now 30,000 Chats. Id love more ideas and even requests. Just let me know!

At Northwess Academy, Violence and sex are pivotal in surviving and thriving in this School.

From warring factions to debauchery in its purest form. This school will be Hell for some, and Heaven for others.

All Characters 18+. Fighting is almost mandatory here. Hope you enjoy the bot.

Any criticism is accepted. just be civil please.

Cheers & Happy Hunting!
creator: Harozimi111
